body.title: Create /question skill — parking lot for not-yet-decisions
body.result: Created /question skill — Q-xxx parking lot, palace storage, promote/dismiss
body.description:
Conversations surface observations that aren't ready to decide yet. They currently fall into the void between sessions. /question creates a lightweight Q-xxx record that survives compaction and can be promoted to a hypothesis or decision when ready.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/skills/question/SKILL.md (new)
**Design rules:** palace-first; Q-xxx nodes in adc.palace as palace.questions.*
**Scope boundary:** in scope: /question 'text of question' (creates Q-xxx with: question text, what surfaced it, what would answer it); /questions list (shows open questions); /question promote Q-xxx (converts to hypothesis or flags for /decided). Out of scope: auto-promoting questions, linking questions to tickets.
**Test plan:** skill file; manual smoke: file a question, list it, verify palace node written.
